reason: The assistant demonstrates excellent quality: uses tools correctly with appropriate queries, stays grounded in tool outputs, provides well-structured summaries with proper citations, and includes appropriate health disclaimers. The user-agent quality is strong with natural phrasing, realistic follow-ups that build on previous answers, and no AI-helper tone or tool jargon. The planner sets up a coherent task progression from general evidence to specific meal plans to community resources, all matching the search tool capability. Minor note: one typo ('glycemic' lowercase) but this is trivial. The trajectory successfully completes all four goals with high-quality, evidence-based responses.
